title: NPR: ceasefire extension deal near but core issues remain — Trump has not decided
snippet: NPR reports Trump says ceasefire extension deal with Iran is near but core issues remain. 60-day MoU largely agreed at negotiator level. Trump has not given final approval. Core issues: Iran's enriched uranium stockpile, frozen assets, Lebanon conflict inclusion. Pakistan mediation channel active.
tag_reason: 신규 — NPR의 종합 분석으로 핵심 쟁점(우라늄, 동결자산, 레바논)을 체계적으로 정리
